news.title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
news.summary: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

news.title: Oracle warns of security bug that hackers abused to breach 100+ companies
news.summary: The tech giant warned of a security flaw that a cybercrime gang said it's exploiting as part of a mass-hacking campaign. Google said it notified more than 100 organizations that had potentially vulnerable servers.
